best_match.name: Textured Crop
best_match.reason: Enhances natural hair texture and complements face shape.

good_options.name: Quiff
good_options.reason: Adds volume and suits the rounded face shape.

good_options.name: Ivy League
good_options.reason: Offers a clean and classic look suitable for medium density.

good_options.name: Caesar Cut
good_options.reason: Short and manageable, ideal for straight hair.

not_recommended.name: Bowl Cut
not_recommended.reason: Exaggerates the roundness of the face.

not_recommended.name: Long Curtains
not_recommended.reason: Overwhelms the natural features and requires high maintenance.

not_recommended.name: Pompadour
not_recommended.reason: Demands high volume and maintenance not suitable for all.

analysis.parting_recommendation: Natural part with a slight angle to add dimension.
analysis.fringe_recommendation: Textured fringe that softens the forehead.

length_options.medium_verdict: Allows styling versatility while maintaining a neat look.
length_options.long_verdict: High maintenance, might not suit overall vibe.

avoid.name: Light Blonde
avoid.reason: Creates too much contrast with natural skin tone.

analysis.summary: For a youthful and friendly look, the Textured Crop is perfect. It complements the round face shape and is easy to maintain. Consider keeping the haircut short to enhance your natural straight hair texture.
care_tips: Use a volumizing mousse to add body.
Opt for a hydrating shampoo to maintain hair health.
Regular trims every 4-6 weeks to maintain shape.
